description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant featuring a cluster of broad, flat, reddish-green leaves radiating outward from a central base. Several tall, slender, angular stems rise from the center, each supporting a single, elongated, teardrop-shaped pod or leaf at its tip. The coloration is primarily a muted green with reddish edges and veins, giving the plant a slightly surreal or alien appearance. The pot itself is not distinctly visible, suggesting the plant may be rooted directly in a mound of soil or a very low-profile container. The overall structure is open and airy, with significant negative space between the stems and leaves. This plant would likely serve as a decorative accent in an urban park, garden, or modern outdoor plaza.
description: A stylized potted plant with broad, reddish-green leaves and tall, angular stems topped with teardrop-shaped pods. The plant has a unique, slightly alien appearance and an open, airy structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cluster of broad leaves at the base and several tall stems with pods extending upward and outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the overlapping leaves and the angular arrangement of the stems, with pods visible at varying heights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the plant, with the stems and pods more prominently silhouetted and the base leaves partially obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical stems and the spread of the base leaves, with the pods angled away from the viewer.
attribute_pot_type: not clearly visible / low-profile soil mound
